site.name: Yunnan Turtle Charter

destinations.title: Destinations
destinations.intro: From spring-like Kunming to the Tibetan highlands of Shangri-La — Yunnan's classic stops at a glance.

attractions.title: Attractions
attractions.intro: Erhai Lake, Jade Dragon Snow Mountain, Tiger Leaping Gorge, Pudacuo — the sights worth lingering over along the way.
